text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Would you be interested in attending the fireworks festival with me
tonight?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a hot afternoon in the middle of summer camp, Mihono Bourbon
approaches me with a slightly nervous look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I blurt out my reply without a second thought. It's the first time she's
ever invited me to something. Excitement bubbles inside of me as I
wait for the evening to come.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
According to my research, there are an average of 70,000 attendees
and ninety stalls. Out of the stalls, we have nine games to choose
from.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Shooting gallery, candy-cutting, goldfish scooping, yo-yo balloons,
ring toss, raffle draw, string lottery, punch box, or watermelon
splitting. Where should we begin?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her usual passive demeanor dissolves as she rattles off a list of
activities. A look of determination sparkles in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I neither like nor dislike them. I would say I have an average amount
of appreciation for them.
choice_data_list: Then why did you want to come here today?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...I believe that spending time together will deepen our connection.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Well... up until now, I have been categorizing social events like this as
inconsequential.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But perhaps... I was mistaken.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she speaks, a hint of emotion colors her voice. Her hand brushes
against her pocket, revealing a familiar-looking stuffed animal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The small round eyes of the bunny peek out from underneath the
fabric.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
For a long time, I struggled to understand the significance of "having
fun."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But for some reason, when this toy is with me, training and studying
become radically different. My motivation levels are amplified.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I began engaging in social interactions, I've realized that
there is value in pursuing "enjoyment."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Perhaps this is what my parents wanted me to understand.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Not sociability as a parameter, but as... something warmer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon's words come together like puzzle pieces, spelling
out her growth and awareness. I feel prouder than ever, knowing how
much effort it must've taken to arrive at this conclusion.
choice_data_list:
All right, I'm feeling pumped now! We're gonna
have tons of fun tonight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I lead the bemused student onto the crowded main street, eager to
make the best of the evening.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Please aim five degrees lower. You're too low now, go up—that's
right, stop right there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click, pop!

text_block_list.name: Shooting Gallery Staff
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, you're a good shot, mister! Congrats on winning the grand
prize!
choice_data_list: It's all thanks to her directions!

text_block_list.name: Shooting Gallery Staff
text_block_list.text: Oooh, you're a good shot, miss! Congrats on winning the grand prize!
choice_data_list: It's all thanks to her directions!

text_block_list.name: Shooting Gallery Staff
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, that's what I call teamwork! Here ya go, now don't lose it on
the way back home!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We visit nearly every game stall, basking in the festivities. Time flies
and before we know it, the night draws to a close.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The fireworks will begin shortly. I suggest we move to a better
location for optimal viewing.

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is that... Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Waving at us from the distance is the girl who approached Bourbon
the other day.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You engaged me in conversation during my break. Statistically, this
action suggests a underlying motive.

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted to talk to you... I'm sorry for taking up your time! I'll get
going now!

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I didn't expect to bump into you here! What a coincidence!
O-oh but, I'm sorry if I'm interrupting you two...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: No need to worry. ...Did you also come here to observe the fireworks?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Tonight's display will showcase an impressively large circular design
as the centerpiece. It is something that I am, as you would say,
"looking forward to."

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Umm... That's it? You're just looking forward to the fireworks? Like,
no scientific reason or anything?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Correct.

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume looks at Mihono Bourbon, puzzled by her simple
response.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the past, the stoic student would've launched into an analytical
monologue. Now, she's taking in the sights and living in the moment.
choice_data_list: Why don't we go watch them together?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Are you sure?
choice_data_list: It'll be fun with more people around!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Understood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Carefully, Mihono Bourbon turns to the student.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Would you like... to view the fireworks together?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Peeew! Boom!

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Wow, they're so pretty! I wasn't sure about coming to the festival by
myself, but I'm really glad I plucked up the courage!

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Bumping into you, looking at pretty things together—ah, sorry! I hope
I'm not boring you with this conversation...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: No, please continue. Do you find these explosions enjoyable?

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I love them! It doesn't matter whether they're big or small, just
being around them makes me feel like I can do anything! I love
experiencing things that I normally can't, like fireworks or even being

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text: with people!

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...Which is why I got a little ahead of myself. I'm sorry if I made you
uncomfortable earlier when I called out to you. Sometimes I'm not
good at keeping my distance...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I understand. If calculating distances is not your forte, then I may be
of great assistance.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
For example, there are thirty-four centimeters of space between us.
The shaved ice stall behind you at four o'clock is eight meters and
twenty-four centimeters away.

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Are you... naturally like this?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If you are referring to my physical composition, then yes, I am all
natural. I do not possess any mechanical components.

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I think I figured you out now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Underneath the spectacular illuminations, the two students chatter
away as if the fireworks will never stop.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Father, it's Mihono Bourbon. I am calling to inform you that
your order has been exec—

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Actually, my apologies. I would like to report a change in personal
affairs instead.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I... made a friend.
